name: Pork and Macaroni Bake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the ground pork, onion, and garlic in hot oil until the onion is golden.
2. Add tomato sauce, tomato paste, mushrooms, and seasonings. Simmer for 15 minutes.
3. Alternate layers of macaroni, cheese, and meat in a greased 2-quart casserole.
4. Sprinkle the top with cheese.
5. Bake in an oven set to 350 degrees for 45 minutes.
